hero.title: Lashes, Nails & Waxing
hero.description: At Lunlalin, every service is hand-crafted with premium materials and meticulous technique — for a look that feels effortless and beautiful.

about.title: Crafted with care, worn with confidence
paragraphs: Lunlalin began with a simple belief: artistry should feel like a ritual of care, not just a beauty transaction. From a single studio chair in Bangkok, we built a reputation on precision technique and immaculate hygiene.

Every technician at Lunlalin is trained to high-quality standards. We use only certified, hypoallergenic materials, because your comfort is as important to us as how beautiful you look walking out the door.

services.title: Signature Services
services.subtitle: Each treatment is tailored to your lifestyle and desired look — designed to enhance your natural beauty.

items.name: Eyelash Extensions
items.description: Classic, hybrid or volume sets built lash-by-lash with ultra-fine fibers for a full, feather-light finish.

items.name: Nail Services
items.description: Beautiful, long-lasting gel polish, nail art, and spa manicures to keep your hands looking flawless.

items.name: Waxing
items.description: Gentle and precise waxing treatments for smooth, hair-free skin using high-quality wax products.

promotions.title: Promotions & Packages
promotions.subtitle: Curated packages that pair our most-loved treatments at a graceful price.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A closer look at the artistry behind every Lunlalin appointment.

items.text: The most natural volume set I've ever had. My technician took the time to design lashes for my exact eye shape — I get compliments every day.
items.author: Pim S.

items.text: Incredibly clean studio and gentle technique. My eyes are sensitive and I never once felt discomfort. Retention lasted a full four weeks.
items.author: Nicha T.

items.text: Love my new gel nails! The nail artists here are so precise and the spa manicure made my hands so soft.
items.author: Ammy K.

items.text: Lunlalin feels more like a spa ritual than a beauty errand. Booking on LINE was effortless and the team is genuinely warm.
items.author: Warisa P.

banner.title: Follow our latest lash artistry
banner.description: New sets, before & afters, and behind-the-scenes moments — every week on Instagram.
